nodes.name: Every 6 Hours
nodes.notes: Matches API spec CRON collect_metrics. At go-live: pick ONE owner — n8n Schedule OR backend cron — to avoid duplicate fetches.

nodes.name: Mock Insert Run
nodes.notes: MOCK of POST /api/v1/workflow-runs. At go-live: HTTP POST returning {id}.

nodes.name: Get Published Posts
nodes.notes: MOCK of GET /v1/publish_events?status=success (cursor-paginated). At go-live: HTTP GET filtered by status=success. The orchestrator iterates each post and fetches its platform insights.

nodes.name: Mock Insert Post Metrics
nodes.notes: MOCK of POST /api/v1/post_metrics — creates a TIME-SERIES row per post per CRON run (so trend over time can be charted). At go-live: HTTP POST with body { publish_event_id, platform_post_id, impressions, reach, likes, comments, saves, shares, engagement_rate, fetched_at }.
